---
title: "Janetta Sewell"
---

## Janetta Sewell

**Dates:** (1819/20-July 1890)

### Description

sister of Elizabeth Missing Sewell and of the Rev. Edwards Sewell

### Biography

[1861 census]

### Letters

- Letter from March 25th 1878
- Letter from March 3d 1876
- Letter from [1871?]
- Letter from May 14th [1869]
- Letter from May 6th 1868

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
